接口 IDocBuildBaseTemplate

所有已知子接口:
IDocBuildTemplate<T>, IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate<T>
所有已知实现类:
GRpcDocBuildTemplate, JavadocDocBuildTemplate, JAXRSDocBuildTemplate, RpcDocBuildTemplate, SolonDocBuildTemplate, SpringBootDocBuildTemplate
public interface IDocBuildBaseTemplate
doc build base template interface.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    default Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass>

  • 方法详细资料

    • supportsFramework

      boolean supportsFramework(String framework)
      support framework.
      参数:
      framework - framework
      返回:
      boolean

    • preRender

    • handleApiGroup

      default List<ApiDoc> handleApiGroup(List<ApiDoc> apiDocList, ApiConfig apiConfig)

      参数:
      apiDocList - list of apiDocList
      apiConfig - ApiConfig apiConfig
      返回:
      List of ApiDoc

    • getCandidateClasses

      default Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass> getCandidateClasses(ProjectDocConfigBuilder docBuilder, DocBuildHelper docBuildHelper)
      If build doc incrementally, we will filter the classes changed from the commit-id in increment-config-file. If not, we will return all classes.
      参数:
      docBuilder - docBuilder
      docBuildHelper - incrementHelper
      返回:
      the candidate classes

    • registeredAnnotations

      FrameworkAnnotations registeredAnnotations()
      registered annotations.
      返回:
      registered annotations

    • isEntryPoint

      default boolean isEntryPoint(com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder javaProjectBuilder, String javaClassName)
      is entry point.
      参数:
      javaProjectBuilder - javaProjectBuilder
      javaClassName - javaClassName
      返回:
      is entry point

    • skipClass

      default boolean skipClass(ApiConfig apiConfig, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Determines if a class should be skipped based on configuration and class annotations. This method is used to decide whether a class should be documented or ignored during the documentation generation process. It primarily checks the class against the configured package filters and exclusion filters, as well as checks for the presence of an ignore annotation.
      参数:
      apiConfig - The API configuration object, containing package filter and exclusion filter settings.
      javaClass - The class object to be checked.
      frameworkAnnotations - The framework annotation object, used to check if the class is an entry point.
      返回:
      true if the class should be skipped, otherwise false.

    • isEntryPoint

      boolean isEntryPoint(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      is entry point.
      参数:
      javaClass - javaClass
      frameworkAnnotations - frameworkAnnotations
      返回:
      is entry point
